texto: Today I realized that I am nothing more than tomorrow's ghost. In a way, it robs my sense of self to know I'm always changing; at the same time, it provides incentive to have the best today possible so I can have a positive influence on tomorrow and, if need be, shake some sense into the living. (Samantha Green)
explicacao: Citação de Riley Noehren sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Today I realized that I am nothing more than tomorrow's ghost. In a way, it robs my sense of self…” articula tempo, becoming, life-and-living em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como life-and-living.
